testing_progress.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-6 had Besu instability; most nodes recovered, some Teku/Erigon nodes still unhappy
Prysm sending multiple new payloads without FCU caused Besu state inconsistency; Prysm will revert, Besu fix likely to be reverted
Nimbus fork-choice issue identified with known fix in progress; Nimbus nodes self-building instead of using remote builder
All clients now onboarded to devnet-6

fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet-7 targeted for Wednesday; EL spec changes (EIP-2780, EIP-8037, EIP-8282) plus CL breaking changes (stable containers, ~5 others) expected
DevNet-7 intended as final devnet; mild spec freeze after launch
CL alpha-12 release and updated EL execution-specs required before devnet-7 launch; target today or Wednesday

organizational.highlight: SSZ Engine API breakout call scheduled for this Friday
Breakout room recordings to be captured via OBS; EL session by Pooja, CL session by Justin

action_items.action: Revert Besu fix for Prysm FCU behavior; re-investigate if issues persist
Resolve remaining EL spec changes (EIP-2780 floor gas input, EIP-8037, EIP-8282) in EL breakout; release updated execution-specs by Wednesday

decisions.decision: Glamsterdam devnet-7 to be the final devnet; mild spec freeze after launch
Minor parameter-only spec changes (e.g., gas cost tweaks for EIP-8038/2780) acceptable post-freeze; structural changes are not

targets.target: Friday - SSZ Engine API breakout call
